response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the entire video from 00:00 to 05:00. 2. The audio consists solely of game sound effects and spoken word commentary by a VTuber. 3. No vocal music was detected in any segment of the video. 4. Since no vocal music is present, a single scene covering the entire duration was created, and all musical fields were set to null.
response.global_summary: This video features gameplay of a VTuber in Minecraft, engaged in farming activities and providing voice commentary. No vocal music is present in this segment.

scenes.description: The entire video features continuous gameplay and commentary by a VTuber in Minecraft. There is no vocal music or singing present.
